title: T-022 — SCN-013 Devices admin screen + pairing API (06-a)
prompt:
# T-022 — SCN-013 Devices admin

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.1 FR-SC-FE-004b
UX: covered via 02-SETTINGS Org Admin entry-point (no dedicated UX section)
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/settings/ops-screens.jsx:4-95 (label devices_screen)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Deliver the org-admin device fleet page at /scanner/admin/devices — KPI tiles (total/online/low battery/offline), device table with battery Progress bars, pair-device modal with QR pairing token (5-min TTL), device defaults form. Includes pair endpoints.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/admin/devices/page.tsx` (Server Component, role-guard via T-016 'admin.devices').
2. Drizzle query JOIN scanner_devices + users + production_lines.
3. Pair API: POST /api/scanner/devices/pair → returns UUID pairing_token (5-min TTL); GET /api/scanner/devices/:id polls status.
4. Modal renders the QR code via `qrcode` lib.
5. Battery bar via shadcn Progress; low-battery threshold ≤ 20%.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/admin/devices/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/admin/devices/pair-modal.client.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/scanner/devices/pair/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/scanner/devices/[id]/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/scn-013-devices.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the page renders, when compared to `design/Monopilot Design System/settings/ops-screens.jsx:4-95`, then it has 4 KPI tiles (total / online / low battery / offline) above a device table with battery Progress bars and a 'Sparuj urządzenie' CTA opening the pair modal — RTL snapshot + manual checklist (structural + visual + interaction parity)
2. Given a non-admin user, when they navigate to /scanner/admin/devices, then withScannerPermission redirects them back to /scanner with denied=admin.devices and the page never renders
3. Given an admin clicks 'Sparuj urządzenie', when POST /api/scanner/devices/pair runs, then a pairing_token UUID is returned, the modal renders the QR, and 5 minutes later GET on the device row returns status='offline' with the token cleared

## Test strategy
- RED: write scn-013-devices.test.tsx asserting parity + admin-only guard + pairing-token TTL before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test scn-013-devices'

## Risk red lines
- Do not expose pairing_token in the device list response after redemption
- Do not let pairing_token survive past 5 minutes
- Do not allow non-admin to view scanner_devices.battery_pct of other users

pipeline_inputs.description: Org-admin device fleet page (KPIs + table + pair-modal QR) with 5-min pairing-token TTL and admin-only guard.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Parity checklist:
1) 4 KPI tiles total / online / low battery / offline.
2) Device table with battery Progress bar and status badge.
3) Pair modal renders QR for the pairing_token.
4) admin.devices role required.
5) Pairing token TTL strictly 5 minutes.
6) Battery threshold ≤ 20% triggers low_battery status.
out_of_scope: Do not implement push notifications to devices
Do not implement OTA update orchestration
acceptance_criteria: Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/settings/ops-screens.jsx:4-95, then it has 4 KPI tiles, the device table with battery Progress bars and 'Sparuj urządzenie' CTA opening the pair modal — RTL snapshot + manual checklist
Given a non-admin user, when they navigate to /scanner/admin/devices, then withScannerPermission redirects to /scanner?denied=admin.devices and the page never renders

Given an admin opens pair modal, when POST /api/scanner/devices/pair runs, then a pairing_token UUID is returned + QR shown + 5 min later GET on the device row returns status='offline' with token cleared
test_strategy: RED: write scn-013-devices.test.tsx asserting parity + admin-only guard + 5-min TTL before implementation
risk_red_lines: Do not expose pairing_token after redemption
Do not let pairing_token survive past 5 min
Do not allow non-admin to view battery_pct of other users
